response.justification: While Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer across multiple high-profile companies, his background is heavily skewed toward Node.js, TypeScript, and other non-Java technologies. His Java experience is limited and not prominently featured in his resume. Additionally, although he has agile experience, his focus on advanced architectures and cloud technologies appears more theoretical than hands-on in the context of Java-based insurance projects. His German language skills are also only basic, which is a key requirement for the role.
strengths: Extensive experience in software development across diverse tech stacks and industries
Strong background in agile methodologies and software craftsmanship principles
Proven ability to work in collaborative, cross-functional teams on complex projects
concerns: Limited demonstrated experience with Java and object-oriented programming in the required context
German language proficiency is only basic, which is a core requirement for client-facing roles in Germany
Overqualification for the Junior role, which may lead to motivation or retention issues
